serverInfo.name: compliance-shield-mcp
serverInfo.description: EU AI Act compliance audit trails and evidence generation for AI agent systems — risk classification, decision logging, gap analysis, and auditor-ready evidence packages
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: assess_risk_level
tools.description: Classify an AI system under EU AI Act risk framework (Unacceptable, High, Limited, Minimal)

tools.name: create_audit_trail
tools.description: Start a compliance audit trail for an AI system with responsible person assignment

tools.name: log_decision
tools.description: Log an AI decision with input, output, reasoning, human oversight, model, and confidence

tools.name: check_compliance_gaps
tools.description: Identify missing compliance requirements with article references and recommendations

tools.name: generate_evidence_package
tools.description: Generate auditor-ready documentation with decision logs, oversight stats, and compliance status

tools.name: get_enforcement_timeline
tools.description: Show upcoming EU AI Act enforcement deadlines with days remaining and penalty structure

resources.description: EU AI Act enforcement timeline with milestones and penalties

pricing.free_limit: Unlimited trails and decisions, in-memory only
pricing.pro: $149/month — persistent storage, scheduled evidence reports, multi-tenant
pricing.enterprise: $599/month — SSO, regulatory authority integration, custom risk frameworks
